First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The LifeX 2065 Inflation-Protected Longevity Income ETF (LIBD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages US Treasury exposure, aiming to provide reliable monthly realized inflation-adjusted distributions through 2065. The fund is designed to appeal to investors born in 1965 and reaching age 100. LIBD was launched on Jan 6, 2025 and is issued by Stone Ridge.
